tracks.meaning: to remove obstructions or unwanted items from a space or surface
easy to perceive, understand, or interpret without confusion or ambiguity
free from clouds, rain, or other precipitation; bright and sunny
transparent or allowing light to pass through so objects can be seen clearly
to declare someone innocent or free from legal charges or suspicion
to earn as profit or net income after all deductions
to pass or be approved through official procedures or authorization
to delete or erase data from a storage device or memory
free from disease, infection, or visible symptoms or abnormalities
free from blemishes, spots, or skin imperfections
mentally lucid and free from confusion or altered states of consciousness
used as an intensifier meaning 'completely' or 'absolutely' in a phrase like 'clear across'
easily measurable or visible as a distinct distance or space
to be acquitted of or have no remaining obligation regarding a debt or charge
to secure an area by removing enemy forces or obstacles
to pass safely without collision or entanglement with an object or shore
